title: Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple
tagline: Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: The Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple is a Hindu temple in the Sasthamangalam ward of Thiruvananthapuram Municipal Corporation, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India.
overview.description: The Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple is a Hindu temple in the Sasthamangalam ward of Thiruvananthapuram Municipal Corporation, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. It is located on top of a hill away from the city centre to promote the spiritual tranquility of the shrine. The temple is more than 700 years old according to the available records, and was regularly visited by the Kings of Travancore. It is administered by the Travancore Devaswom Board.

topPlaces.name: Sasthamangalam
topPlaces.description: Sasthamangalam is a ward in the city of Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. It is known for the Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple, one of the four major temples regularly visited by the Kings of Travancore, in the past.

topPlaces.name: Trivandrum Golf Club
topPlaces.description: National Golf Academy and Trivandrum Golf Club is a nine-hole golf course located at Thiruvananthapuram city in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Lok Bhavan, Thiruvananthapuram
topPlaces.description: Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan (translation: King's House) is the official residence of the governor of Kerala Rajendra Arlekar. It is located in the capital city of Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kowdiar Palace
topPlaces.description: Kowdiar Palace is the official residence of the Travancore Royal Family, situated in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. The Kowdiar Palace, a regal residence was built by the Maharaja, Sri Chithira Thirunal.

topPlaces.name: Archdiocese of Trivandrum
topPlaces.description: The Archdiocese of Trivandrum (Latin: Trivandren(sis) Latinorum) is a Latin Church ecclesiastical territory or archdiocese of the Catholic Church. Its episcopal see is Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Saraswathy Vidyalaya
topPlaces.description: Saraswathi Vidyalaya is an educational institution situated in Arapura, Thiruvananthapuram, India. The school was established in May 1991.

topPlaces.name: Kowdiar
topPlaces.description: Kowdiar is one of the main localities in the city of Trivandrum, Kerala, India. It is one of the most expensive and cleanest localities in Trivandrum.

topPlaces.name: C-DAC Thiruvananthapuram
topPlaces.description: The Centre for Development of Advanced Computing, Thiruvananthapuram (C-DAC[T]) is a branch of the Indian Centre for Development of Advanced Computing based in Thiruvananthapuram. It is a National Centre of Excellence, pioneering application oriented research, design and development in Electronics and Information Technology.

items.note: Sasthamangalam is a ward in the city of Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. It is known for the Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple, one of the four major temples regularly visited by the Kings of Travancore, in the past.
National Golf Academy and Trivandrum Golf Club is a nine-hole golf course located at Thiruvananthapuram city in the Indian state of Kerala.
Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan (translation: King's House) is the official residence of the governor of Kerala Rajendra Arlekar. It is located in the capital city of Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala.

Kowdiar Palace is the official residence of the Travancore Royal Family, situated in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. The Kowdiar Palace, a regal residence was built by the Maharaja, Sri Chithira Thirunal.

The Archdiocese of Trivandrum (Latin: Trivandren(sis) Latinorum) is a Latin Church ecclesiastical territory or archdiocese of the Catholic Church. Its episcopal see is Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala, India.
Saraswathi Vidyalaya is an educational institution situated in Arapura, Thiruvananthapuram, India. The school was established in May 1991.
Kowdiar is one of the main localities in the city of Trivandrum, Kerala, India. It is one of the most expensive and cleanest localities in Trivandrum.

The Centre for Development of Advanced Computing, Thiruvananthapuram (C-DAC[T]) is a branch of the Indian Centre for Development of Advanced Computing based in Thiruvananthapuram. It is a National Centre of Excellence, pioneering application oriented research, design and development in Electronics and Information Technology.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (7 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (4 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sasthamangalam Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sasthamangalam, Trivandrum Golf Club, Lok Bhavan, Thiruvananthapuram, Kowdiar Palace, Archdiocese of Trivandrum.
